name: Configure LMS Setup for Moodle Integration
description: You are an IT administrator at State University setting up the SEB Server to work with the institution's Moodle LMS. Create a new LMS Setup entry named 'State University Moodle' with the LMS Type 'Moodle', Server URL 'https://moodle.stateuniversity.edu', Username/Client Name 'seb-server-integration', and Password/Client Secret 'Xk9mP2wLq7nR4vJ'. Access the SEB Server admin interface using the username 'super-admin' and password 'admin'. Note that the connection test is expected to fail; the objective is to successfully save the configuration entry so it appears in the LMS Setup list.
